notes: Fixes native game-port HDMI audio routing on Raspberry Pi 5, including SpaghettiKart.
Recovers HarbourMasters ports when a saved configuration disabled the audio backend.
Uses fullscreen widescreen defaults for managed native ports on HDMI while preserving CRT output behavior.
Fixes Super Mario 64 GLES shader compatibility on Raspberry Pi 4 and Pi 5.
Adds the native runtime libraries required by the bundled ports.
